$comment: scripts/ViridianCity.asm ViridianCityCheckGymOpenScript — the gym stays shut until you hold every OTHER badge (cp ~(1 << BIT_EARTHBADGE)), then EVENT_VIRIDIAN_GYM_OPEN latches on for good. The asm latches on any step; the record latches on the door step itself — the only cell that consults the flag — as a non-consuming poke sorted (by id) before the gym_locked gate, so the seventh badge opens the door on the very step.

trigger.when: not VIRIDIAN_GYM_OPEN and badge_boulderbadge and badge_cascadebadge and badge_thunderbadge and badge_rainbowbadge and badge_soulbadge and badge_marshbadge and badge_volcanobadge
